cards.heading: Seasonal Sri Lankan Spiced Coffee
cards.description: Estate-grown beans slow-brewed with cardamom, clove and a touch of jaggery — the way the hill country warms up on a misty morning.

cards.heading: Weekend High Tea Platter for Two
cards.description: Love cake, butter cookies and short eats served with a pot of Uva tea — a proper pause for two, every Saturday and Sunday.

cards.heading: Traveler's Express Breakfast Deal
cards.description: Milk toast, an egg roti and your choice of coffee or tea, plated fast for anyone still tackling the hairpin bends ahead.
